title: Cinematic Portrait Man Orange Rim Lighting
sourceTitle: Nanobanana Org 1452 Cinematic Portrait Man Orange Rim Lighting
prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a stylish young man with short textured brown hair and light stubble, wearing black sunglasses and a bright orange oversized t-shirt. Side profile pose with head slightly turned toward the camera. Dark deep blue studio background with dramatic orange rim lighting outlining the shoulders and hair. High contrast lighting creating a modern neon glow effect. Fashion editorial photography style, sharp skin and fabric texture.
